summary: The diff implements most requirements well. REQ-1 (branding), REQ-2 (share buttons), REQ-3 (non-blocking year selection), and REQ-4 (translation strings) are all clearly implemented. REQ-5 is partially addressed — the backend query functions are present but still retain the ({ caller }) pattern, and crucially getAllCollegeConnects is not visible in the truncated diff, raising uncertainty about its public accessibility.

missing_requirements.requirement: getAllCollegeConnects must be publicly accessible without Internet Identity login
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff is truncated and does not show the getAllCollegeConnects function. While getAllPosts, getPostsByCategory, and getStats are visible, getAllCollegeConnects is not confirmed to exist or be unauthenticated in the diff.
